ns0:entry.ns0:title: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
Language: python
A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Graphify-Labs/graphify
Language: python
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMCache/LMCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache
Language: python
LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bradautomates/claude-video
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bradautomates/claude-video
Language: python
Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
Language: python
A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/SkillOpt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/SkillOpt
Language: python
SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/supervision
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/supervision
Language: python
We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sherlock-project/sherlock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sherlock-project/sherlock
Language: python
Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stanfordnlp/dspy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy
Language: python
DSPy: The framework for programming—not prompting—language models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unclecode/crawl4ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unclecode/crawl4ai
Language: python
🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN
